Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit

« All Events

Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit

June 15 @ 9:00 am - 2:00 pm
  • « Mental Health Awareness Night with the Indianapolis Indians

« All Events

Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit

June 15 @ 9:00 am - 2:00 pm
  • « Mental Health Awareness Night with the Indianapolis Indians

Calling all High School Coaches and Athletic Directors! Are you looking for mental health specific trainings that best set you up to support your student athletes?

Join us at the second Annual Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit, supported by Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield. On Monday, June 15, The Working Mind – Sports modified mental health training and conversation facilitated by Opening Minds, an initiative of the Mental Health Commission of Canada. This training is designed specifically for high school athletic administrators and coaches, equipping them to better support student-athletes across all aspects of mental well-being.

You must register for this event using this link: 26 KTS | Indiana High School Coaches Mental Health Summit Registration – Intellistack

This is a paid event, 100% of proceeds go back to Kicking The Stigma and the Action Grant program.
